title: LobbyLogEntry
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 19a.4 (added by canon 0.3.0, ADR-013). Owned by transparency-service (epd2_transparency_service.domain.LobbyLogEntry). organization_name, related_subject_type, related_subject_id, contact_date, topic_summary, submitted_by_role_id are mandatory - a submission missing any of these is rejected, never published incomplete. Publication window is 7 calendar days after submitted_at, with mandatory automated (not human) pre-publication validation (ADR-015 item 4, amended). Status submitted -> published, one-shot, no return; a correction is a new row with supersedes_entry_id set.
